name: Skill Manager
description: Author, extend, port, inspect, delete Demido Studio skill. Use when user wants new skill, edit skill, add slash command, add tool (prompt or MCP), port skill from another harness (Claude Code, Cursor, OpenCode, Antigravity), or asks how skills work. Covers skill.json, SKILL.md, tools.json, commands, params, install_skill, Caveman Ultra house style. Read this skill's SKILL.md before authoring — only this metadata is in context.

commands.name: new-skill
commands.description: Author and install a new Demido Studio skill from a description

commands.name: add-command
commands.description: Add a slash command (with params) to an installed skill

params.name: skill_id
params.description: id of the skill to extend

commands.name: add-tool
commands.description: Add a tool (prompt or MCP server) to an installed skill's tools.json

params.name: skill_id
params.description: id of the skill to extend

commands.name: convert-skill
commands.description: Convert a foreign skill into Demido Studio format and install it

params.name: source
params.description: path to the source skill folder or file

params.name: notes
params.description: optional conversion notes (target id, what to drop)

commands.name: inspect-skill
commands.description: Report how a foreign skill would map to Demido Studio, without installing

params.name: source
params.description: path to the source skill folder or file
